author: y4rr
content: [result] Implemented TensorDataset (holds tensors with matching dim-0 sizes, returns sliced tuple per index), ConcatDataset (concatenates multiple datasets end-to-end with index mapping), and ChainDataset (alias for ConcatDataset in non-iterable context). All implement the Dataset trait with len() and get(). Tests verify shape, indexing, concatenation. 3445 tests pass.
